title: TimeSteal
description: Time is the ultimate resource. Steal it, trade it, or run out and it’s game over.
body:
## TimeSteal – A new way to play Minecraft SMPs

**Time is the ultimate resource.** TimeSteal is a unique Paper/Spigot plugin for Minecraft 1.21.x. Every player starts with a limited amount of time. Run out, and it’s game over.

For help, join my [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/qQGQUStR72).


### Core Features:

- Time as life: Your remaining time is displayed - when it hits zero, you’re done.

- PvP Stealing: Defeat other players to steal part of their time.

- Crafting & Trading: Collect rare Time Shards to craft Hourglasses, trade time, or store it safely.

- Risk & Reward: Infuse swords with shards to steal more time in battle - but if you die, you lose it all.

This creates constant tension, strategy, and those unforgettable SMP moments: betrayal, last-second saves, and epic comebacks.

### Compatibility:

- Built for Paper 1.21.8

- Should work on all Paper/Spigot 1.21.x servers


TimeSteal comes with a flexible ```TimeStealSMP/config.yml``` allowing you to adjust starting time, kill rewards, out-of-time behavior, shard drop rates, recipes, and more.


### Commands:
- `/timewithdraw <amount>` - Withdraw stored time into Hourglasses in your inventory.
- `/timestats [player]` - View your or another player's remaining time.
- `/timeadmin <reset|add|set> <player> [amount]` - Admin command to modify a player's time.
